nasb.text: A plan in the heart of a man is like deep water, But a man of understanding draws it out.

esv.text: The purpose in a man’s heart is like deep water, but a man of understanding will draw it out.

cnv.text: 人心裡的謀略如同深水， 唯有聰明人能汲引出來。

ccb.text: 人心的谋略如深水， 唯有哲士才能汲取。

csbs.text: 人心里的谋略如同深水， 但聪慧人能把它取出来。
